name: mortgage-calculator-ai
description: Calculate mortgage payments, compare rates, generate amortization schedules, and check affordability.

tools.name: calculate_mortgage
tools.description: Calculate monthly mortgage payment with optional down payment. Rate is annual percentage (e.g. 6.5).

tools.name: compare_rates
tools.description: Compare monthly payments across multiple interest rates side by side.

tools.name: amortization_schedule
tools.description: Generate a yearly amortization schedule showing principal vs interest breakdown.

tools.name: affordability_check
tools.description: Estimate maximum affordable home price based on income and debts using 28/36 rule.
